description: Transfer the registered ownership of a civilian vehicle in OpenCAD (http://localhost) using admin credentials (Email: admin@opencad.local, Password: Admin123!). A support truck (Plate: XCAV8R) is being reassigned from 'John Driller' to 'Sarah SiteLead'. Update the vehicle record to reflect 'Sarah SiteLead' as the new Registered Owner while ensuring the existing record is preserved to maintain its history.
